inputs.text: I was charged twice for my subscription this month, can I get a refund?
Why did my invoice jump from $20 to $45? I didn't change my plan.
Can I switch my payment method from PayPal to a credit card?
Please cancel my plan and refund the last payment.
The app crashes every time I try to upload a photo.
I keep getting a 500 error when I open the dashboard.
Exports have been stuck on 'processing' for two hours and never finish.
The mobile notifications stopped working after the latest update.
I can't log in, it says my password is incorrect but I'm sure it's right.
I'm locked out after too many login attempts, how do I get back in?
My 2FA device broke and now I can't receive the verification code.
How do I reset my password? The reset email never arrives.
It would be great if you could add a dark mode to the web app.
Any chance of adding CSV export for the reports section?
Please consider supporting multiple workspaces under one account.
Can you build an integration with Slack? That would save us a lot of time.
This is the third time support has ignored my ticket. Absolutely unacceptable.
Your agent was rude and hung up on me. I'm very disappointed.
I've been a customer for years and the service keeps getting worse.
Waiting 45 minutes on hold is ridiculous and I'm done with this.
Hi there! Just wanted to say thanks for the quick help yesterday.
Hello, is anyone there?
What are your office hours over the holidays?
Good morning, hope you're having a great day.
